name: M1 Kliniken AG
summary: M1 Kliniken AG, together with its subsidiaries, operates medical centers for aesthetic and plastic surgery in Europe. The company operates through Beauty and Trade segments. It develops and markets pharmaceutical, medical, and medical technology products for aesthetic medicine, plastic surgery, and cosmetic dermatology. The company also engages in the acquisition, development, operation, and sale of real estate, primarily in the health care sector. In addition, it offers its products to private customers, doctors, pharmacies, and wholesalers under the M1 Select and M1 Aesthetics brands. It operates a network of outpatient specialist centers for beauty treatments; and a specialist surgical clinic centres under the M1 Med Beauty, M1 Laser, and M1 Dental brand names. M1 Kliniken AG was founded in 2007 and is based in Berlin, Germany. M1 Kliniken AG operates as a subsidiary of MPH Health Care AG.
